message:
feat(agents): add recursive agent tree scanner

Adds scanAgentTree() which recursively scans a directory tree to build
a map of agent paths to specs. Supports nested agents via the convention
root/agents/<name>.md with children at <name>/agents/<child>.md, and
namespace directories without spec files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
